title: Housing Joint
description: A building block decoration mod seperated from the A.V.A Guns Mod
body:
Supports JEI

 

Crafting:

"SLS"
"IWI"
"SSS"
'S', Items.STONE
'W', WATER_BUCKET
'I', ICE
.L', LEAVES



Adds all building blocks from

A.V.A - Alliance of Valiant Arms Guns

 

for those people who are interested in blocks only but not those weapons.

 

- Plaster blocks

- More colour concrete, concrete powder, wool

- Thin Walls (Vertical side half slab)

- Walls (Vertical middle half slab)

 

Rough Slopes

- 22.5

- 45

- 67.5

 

Wall lights

 

Some misc blocks

- Iron grids

- Planks floors

- etc

 

Some examples of building
